revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''2-6-100

Alternative term: Obstruction Mark (or Buoy) (U.S.A.)

A mark (or buoy) used alone to indicate a dangerous reef or shoal. The mark (or buoy) may be passed on either hand.

[[Image:Ch2_Fig54.jpg|600px|border]]


{{IALAFooter}}
